name: Shredded Chicken Salad with Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken breasts in a saucepan with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, add 1/2 teaspoon salt, reduce heat, and simmer until cooked through, about 15 minutes.
2. Drain the chicken and allow it to cool. Remove and discard the skin. Tear the meat into shreds and place in a salad bowl.
3. Heat the oil in a medium-size skillet over medium-high heat. Saute the onions, stirring, until deep golden brown, about 20 minutes.
4. Drain the onions and add them to the chicken. Cool to room temperature.
5. Add the walnuts, scallions, and cilantro to the chicken. Toss with the mayonnaise and season with salt and pepper.
6. Serve the salad at room temperature.
